meta.title: Vaman Nayak – Vice President, JW
meta.description: Portfolio of Vaman Nayak, Vice President at JW, specializing in cold chain logistics, 3PL warehousing, reefer transportation, and GDP/QMS compliant cold storage operations across India.

vcard.title: Vice President – Cold Chain Logistics
vcard.note: Vice President at JW | Cold Chain Logistics | 3PL | GDP & IMS Compliant Warehousing | Pan-India Reefer Transportation

hero.name: Vaman Nayak — Vice President, JW
hero.heading: India's perishables deserve better infrastructure. At JW, we're building it — across every cold mile.
hero.bio: Every year, India loses thousands of crores worth of pharma, food, and allied cargo to broken cold chains — wrong temperatures, missed compliance, no network coverage beyond metros. At JW, I lead operations that fix exactly that: GDP-compliant cold storage, 3PL fulfilment, and reefer networks spanning Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi/NCR and Chennai. If your supply chain touches cold cargo anywhere in India, we're already built for your problem — and actively expanding to meet where demand is going next.

projects.title: Pan-India Cold Chain Expansion
projects.description: Most cold chain operators only cover metros — leaving Tier-2 markets, regional distributors, and multi-city supply chains underserved. JW runs an integrated network across Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi/NCR and Chennai covering cold storage (Food, Pharma & Allied), ambient warehousing, customs bonded facilities, and primary & secondary reefer transport under one roof. Next: Tier-2 city penetration and last-mile cold coverage for FMCG and pharma partners who need it most.

projects.title: GDP & IMS Compliant Cold Facility
projects.description: Pharma and food companies routinely fail compliance audits because their logistics partner isn't built to the right standard. JW's cold facility is GDP and IMS certified — with continuous QMS training cycles that keep the team audit-ready year-round, not just at inspection time. If your cargo needs a facility that holds up under regulatory scrutiny and delivers traceability end-to-end, this is the infrastructure your compliance team has been asking for.

paragraphs: India's cold chain is not a solved problem — it's a growing one. Rising pharma exports, organised retail expansion, and FMCG penetration into Tier-2 cities are all creating demand that existing infrastructure simply cannot absorb. At JW, we've spent years building the network, the compliance systems, and the operational muscle to absorb exactly that demand — so when your business needs to scale cold, we scale with you.

Partnering with JW means your cargo moves through facilities that are GDP-certified, IMS-compliant, and staffed by teams who treat every audit as business-as-usual. It means reefer routes that cover metros today and Tier-2 corridors tomorrow. And it means working with an operator who is actively investing in the next decade of Indian logistics — not waiting to react to it. The infrastructure is here. The growth is next.

meta.title: Raaj Sharma – Director, Sales Strategy
meta.description: Portfolio of Raaj Sharma, Director of Sales Strategy, focused on B2B SaaS growth, enterprise pipelines, and go-to-market playbooks.

vcard.title: Director – Sales Strategy
vcard.note: Director, Sales Strategy | B2B SaaS | Enterprise GTM | Pipeline & Revenue Operations

hero.name: Raaj
hero.heading: I'm Raaj Sharma, Director of Sales Strategy — turning pipelines into predictable revenue.
hero.bio: I lead sales strategy and GTM at Acme Corp, partnering with founders and RevOps teams to design pipelines that actually close. Today I'm focused on enterprise SaaS; tomorrow, on the playbooks that help the next generation of sales leaders run their own orgs with rigour.

projects.title: Enterprise Pipeline Rebuild
projects.description: Currently rebuilding the enterprise sales motion at Acme — new ICP, refreshed qualification criteria, and a forecasting system the leadership team can actually trust. Next phase: embedding AI-assisted account research into the rep workflow.

projects.title: GTM Playbook for Series-B Founders
projects.description: Running a recurring advisory program for early-stage founders — codifying the plays, tools and metrics that separate scalable sales motions from one-off wins. Expanding into a community in 2026.

paragraphs: I'm a sales leader who believes great pipelines are designed, not hoped for. At Acme, I own sales strategy end-to-end — from ICP definition through to forecasting and board-level revenue narratives.

Looking ahead, I'm convinced the next wave of enterprise sales will be AI-native — reps augmented with research, deal coaching and real-time forecasting. That's the future I'm building toward, both at Acme and in the founder community I advise.

testimonials.name: Priya Menon
testimonials.text: "Raaj doesn't just hit numbers — he builds the machines that make numbers repeatable. Rare combination of strategist and operator."

testimonials.name: Arjun Iyer
testimonials.text: "Few people I'd want on my side in a tough enterprise deal more than Raaj. He reads rooms and pipelines equally well."
